$note: Copy to wdk.config.json (gitignored), fill the three PASTE_ values from your bundler/paymaster provider (e.g. Pimlico), set WDK_CONFIG=./wdk.config.json and WALLY_GASLESS_CHAINS=arbitrum in .env.local, restart. The arbitrum wallet becomes a Safe smart account (new address) that pays gas in USDT.
